name: @vaagatech/reconcile-workspace
description: Declarative Snapshot and Reconciliation Testing — open-source monorepo by VaagaTech
author: VaagaTech (https://www.vaagatech.com)

scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-run-all
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/auth-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/api-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/core --access public
